batch_summary: Ross breaks the news to his shocked parents that his ex-wife and her partner, Susan, are raising his baby. As the coffee shop closes, Ross stays behind to help Rachel clean up. He gently asks her if she is nervous about seeing Barry the next day, hinting at unresolved tension.
